title: April 11
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 11''' is the 101st day of the year (102nd in leap years). There are 264 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Meshach Taylor]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Jay Benedict]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Marina Fitch]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Greg Keyes]] is born.
*[[1960s#1965|1965]] – [[Rodolfo Damaggio]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 13|''Star Wars'' (1977) 13]] published. The cover date is July.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 59|''Star Wars Weekly'' 59]] published.
*[[1983]] – ''[[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|The Empire Strikes Back:]]'' "[[Gambler's Choice]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 43|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 43]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 9|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 9]] published.
*1995 – [[Droids (1995) 1|''Droids '' 1]] published.
*2002 – [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 51|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' 51]] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 15|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 15]] published.
*[[2012]] – [[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 5|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 5]] published.
*2012 – [[Knights of the Old Republic: War 4|''Knights of the Old Republic: War'' 4]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[Thrawn (novel)|''Thrawn'']] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Thrawn 3|''Thrawn'' 3]] published.
*2018 – [[Darth Vader (2017) 14|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 14]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Celebration Chicago]] begins.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars The Dark Side Pocket Expert]]'' published.
<noinclude>
